---
title: "Lewis Henry De Blois Humbert"
---

## Lewis Henry De Blois Humbert

**Dates:** (1856/7-1867)

### Description

son of the Rev. Lewis Humbert, Warden of St. Cross Hospital

### Biography

<i>The Hampshire Telegraph</i> (11 May 1867) recorded his death aged 10 years.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 12 [1867]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
